svg.text: SHIFT = hold the bottom-left ▶ transport button · keep the hardware on its default layer (don't press the device's own SHIFT key)
button LED lights while active (mic live) · □ LEDs: strips 2/3 = recording, strips 6/7 = on air (stream watchdog)
shift: … = function while holding the bottom-left ▶ button

Track progress: the M/S/R LEDs of strips 1–3 (deck 1) and 6–8 (deck 2) fill in the red-numbered order as the track plays (one segment per ninth); all nine flash when <30 s remain. Cue shows on the □/play LED
EQ kills (M/S/R of strips 4–5, dotted) cut the high/mid/low band of each deck; their LEDs stay lit while the band passes and go dark when killed
Generated by generate-layout.py · mapping files: Donner-StarryCTRL-DJ.midi.xml + Donner-StarryCTRL-DJ-scripts.js
